info.description: Orion Core API for agent management and monitoring
info.title: Orion Core API

get.description: Returns the health status of the API server
Get the public-safe projection of a published or unlisted status page
Get an embeddable SVG badge for the current public-safe status page state
Get an embeddable SVG badge for a visible public component state
get.summary: Get public status page component badge

get.description: Get sanitized public uptime history for one visible component
get.summary: Get public status page component history

get.description: Get a sanitized public uptime summary for one visible component
get.summary: Get public status page component uptime

get.description: Get sanitized public history for a published or unlisted status page
Get published public incidents for a status page
Get a published public incident for a status page
Get published public updates for one public incident
get.summary: Get public status page incident history

post.description: Create or refresh a pending public subscriber without exposing confirmation tokens

get.description: Confirm a pending public subscriber by one-time token hash
Get masked subscriber preferences by manage token
get.summary: Get public status page subscriber preferences

put.description: Update visible component preferences by manage token
put.summary: Update public status page subscriber preferences

post.description: Idempotently unsubscribe a public status page subscriber by token

get.description: Get a paginated list of all registered agents

parameters.description: Maximum number of agents to return
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Search by server or monitor name
parameters.name: search

parameters.description: Filter by maintenance mode true or false
parameters.name: maintenance

parameters.description: Only return servers with active incidents
parameters.name: has_incidents

get.description: Get aggregate counts for registered agents by health, maintenance, stale, and incident status

post.description: Receive and deduplicate a bounded batch of structured Orion Agent service logs

put.description: Enable or disable maintenance mode for a specific agent

post.description: Register a new monitor for a specific agent
Receive and store a system metrics report from an agent
Unregister a monitor for a specific agent
Receive and store a monitor report for a specific monitor

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific agent including latest report
Get split agent availability and monitor rollup health for a specific agent
Get a paginated list of monitors for a specific agent with optional filters

parameters.description: Maximum number of monitors to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Get a paginated list of system metric reports for a specific agent

parameters.description: Maximum number of reports to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Get paginated structured service logs for a specific Orion Agent

parameters.description: Maximum number of logs to return
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Search message, component, monitor, and related IDs
parameters.name: q

get.description: Returns daily uptime buckets and overall uptime percentage for an agent.
Get persisted alert channels and their last delivery status

post.description: Create a webhook or email alert channel. Secret values are stored but never returned by the API.

delete.description: Delete an alert channel. Existing delivery history is preserved.

patch.description: Update an alert channel. Omit email secret values to keep existing stored values.

post.description: Send a manual test notification through a configured webhook or email alert channel.

get.description: Get a paginated list of alert delivery attempts

parameters.description: Maximum number of deliveries to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Get reusable email destinations and their last delivery status

post.description: Create a reusable email destination that sends through an SMTP service.

delete.description: Delete a reusable email destination. Existing delivery history is preserved.

post.description: Send a manual test notification through a reusable email destination. Delivery errors are sanitized in the response.

get.description: Get explicit alert routes ordered by priority

post.description: Create a priority-ordered alert route that can target channels or suppress matching events
Explain route event matching, suppression, cooldown, and destination decisions without creating deliveries or sending notifications

delete.description: Delete an alert route. Existing delivery history is preserved.

patch.description: Update alert route match filters, destination channels, or suppression behavior

get.description: Get effective built-in alert rules derived from Core configuration
Get reusable SMTP services without secret values

post.description: Create a reusable SMTP service. Secret values are stored but never returned by the API.

delete.description: Delete a reusable SMTP service. Existing delivery history is preserved.

patch.description: Update a reusable SMTP service. Omit password to keep the existing stored value.

post.description: Connect to a reusable SMTP service and return a sanitized connectivity result without secret values.
Returns a JWT for frontend API requests when frontend auth is configured.

get.description: Get Core runtime request, ingestion, report write, incident reconciliation, SQLite, and slow-operation diagnostics
Get Core monitor worker heartbeat state without affecting Core API health
Get a paginated operational event log for Core, agents, monitors, incidents, alerts, and lifecycle actions

parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Search event type, source, message, and related IDs
parameters.name: q

get.description: Get a list of all monitors with health issues (down, degraded, or stale)
Get overall system health summary including agent and monitor counts

post.description: Record a failure signal for a Core heartbeat monitor using its generated token.
Record a success signal for a Core heartbeat monitor using its generated token.

get.description: Get a paginated list of persisted incidents. Defaults to active incidents.

parameters.description: Filter to incidents with failed notifications or high/critical/error severity
parameters.name: needs_review

parameters.description: Maximum number of incidents to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Get a list of monitors that are candidates for incidents based on failing health status or stale reports
Get one incident with related timeline events, alert deliveries, and monitor reports

post.description: Mark an active incident as acknowledged and record a manual incident event
Mark an active incident as resolved, clear its monitor active incident path, and record a manual incident event

get.description: Get normalized incident timeline events including alert delivery attempts
Get paginated structured service logs shipped by Orion services

parameters.description: Maximum number of logs to return
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Search message, component, monitor, and related IDs
parameters.name: q

get.description: Get a paginated list of all monitors with optional filters

parameters.description: Maximum number of monitors to return
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Search by monitor, agent, or type
parameters.name: search

parameters.description: Filter by owner name, id, or machine id
parameters.name: owner_name

parameters.description: Only return monitors with active incidents
parameters.name: has_incidents

post.description: Create a Core-managed monitor and its runner configuration.

get.description: Get aggregate counts for active monitors by health, stale, and incident status
Get detailed information about a specific monitor including recent reports and computed health

delete.description: Soft delete a Core-managed monitor and pause its runner configuration.

patch.description: Update a Core-managed monitor and its runner configuration.

get.description: Return redacted Core-managed monitor configuration.
Get a paginated list of reports for a specific monitor

parameters.description: Maximum number of reports to return
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Pause a Core-managed monitor so the worker will not claim it.
Resume a Core-managed monitor and make it due immediately.
Execute a Core-managed monitor immediately and store the resulting monitor report.

get.description: Returns daily uptime buckets and overall uptime percentage for a monitor.

post.description: Register a new agent or reconnect an existing agent by machine ID

get.description: Get persisted raw report archive and uptime rollup settings

put.description: Update persisted raw report archive and uptime rollup settings

post.description: Archive old raw reports to the configured local SQLite archive file
Compute daily monitor uptime rollups. When date is omitted, rolls up yesterday.

get.description: Get status page publication configurations ordered by title

post.description: Create a draft status page publication configuration

get.description: Get a status page with sections, components, mappings, incidents, and incident updates

put.description: Update page-level status page publication settings

get.description: Get components and mappings for a status page

post.description: Create a public component for a status page

put.description: Update a public component for a status page

get.description: Get internal resource mappings for a public component

post.description: Map a public component to an internal agent or monitor

put.description: Update a public component internal resource mapping

get.description: Get manual public incident records for a status page

post.description: Create a manual public incident for a status page

get.description: Suggest public status page components mapped to the internal incident monitor or agent without exposing internal incident details

put.description: Update a manual public incident for a status page

post.description: Create a public timeline update for a manual status page incident

get.description: Preview the public-safe projection of a status page draft or publication

post.description: Mark a status page as public and set published_at

get.description: Get sections for a status page

post.description: Create a section for grouping public components
Return a status page to draft visibility while retaining published_at history

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
